name: puntovivo
description: Modern POS Solutions System - Desktop Application

scripts.build:desktop: npm run build --workspace=@puntovivo/web && npm run make:desktop
scripts.ci:web: npm run ci:audit && npm run typecheck --workspace=@puntovivo/web && npm run lint --workspace=@puntovivo/web && npm run test:coverage --workspace=@puntovivo/web -- --run && npm run build --workspace=@puntovivo/web
scripts.ci:desktop: npm run ci:audit && npm run build --workspace=@puntovivo/server && npm run build --workspace=@puntovivo/web && npm run typecheck --workspace=@puntovivo/desktop && npm run lint --workspace=@puntovivo/desktop && npm run test --workspace=@puntovivo/desktop
scripts.ci:server: npm run ci:audit && npm run typecheck --workspace=@puntovivo/server && npm run lint --workspace=@puntovivo/server && npm run test:coverage --workspace=@puntovivo/server
scripts.test:e2e:web: node scripts/ensure-playwright-browser.mjs && npm run native:ensure:node --workspace=@puntovivo/server && playwright test --config=playwright.web.config.ts
